questions.question: List any three major challenges in water resources management.
expectedPoints: Water Scarcity: Both physical and economic shortage of water.
Water Pollution: Contamination from industrial, agricultural, and domestic waste.
Over-exploitation of Groundwater: Unsustainable pumping leading to falling water tables.

questions.question: Explain the concept of Integrated Water Resources Management (IWRM). Discuss its key principles and why it is considered a sustainable approach.
expectedPoints: Definition: IWRM is a process that promotes coordinated development and management of water, land, and related resources.
Principle 1: Social Equity - Ensuring fair access to water for all user groups.
Principle 2: Economic Efficiency - Using water to derive maximum benefits.
Principle 3: Environmental Sustainability - Protecting aquatic ecosystems for the long term.

Why Sustainable: It moves away from fragmented, sectoral management and encourages a holistic view that meets the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs.
